client.name: Ganbar Shabanov
client.label: Junior finance and accounting professional with reconciliation, SAP, SOX, and cross-market financial operations experience

core_positioning.notes: Best fit is junior finance analyst, FP&A-adjacent, management reporting, reconciliation, controls, and finance operations roles. Position honestly as a rising operator moving from finance operations and dispute analysis toward FP&A without claiming direct budgeting or forecasting ownership. Avoid BPO/outsourcing companies and customer-service-heavy finance roles per source guidance.

summary_base: Junior finance and accounting professional with 1+ year of hands-on experience in financial data analysis, account reconciliation, invoice dispute investigation, and SOX-related review work across 6 European markets.

Strongest evidence includes recovering up to $20,000 monthly in disputed invoice value, handling roughly $50,000 in monthly disputed invoices, and rebuilding a 100+ page internal process guide used across the department.
Brings practical SAP and advanced Excel experience, stakeholder-facing reporting exposure, strong learning velocity, and active ACCA F3 study toward a more analytical finance track.

experience.summary: Global IT services firm (10,000+ employees). Primary analyst for the Turkey market with active support across Portugal, Poland, Austria, Switzerland, and Spain — managing invoice disputes, account reconciliation, and financial process compliance for the FedEx account.
highlights: **Recovered up to $20,000 monthly in disputed invoice value** by investigating client claims across 6 European markets, reconciling account statements in SAP, and processing credit notes, debit notes, and rebills in Mainframe.
**Covered the Turkey market solo within the first 2 months** during a team shortage, scaling from 4-5 expected cases per day to 25 cases per day and earning management recognition.
**Investigated roughly $50,000 in monthly disputed invoices** for key accounts in Portugal and Spain, approving 50-60% of claims with credits and rejecting the rest with documented evidence.
**Delivered monthly SOX self-assessment reviews** by extracting SAP reports, restructuring data in Excel, and presenting selected high-value cases to client project owners.
**Rebuilt the department's 100+ page Rebill DDP** into a single structured reference guide now used across the department.
**Trained new team members on live finance processes** across multiple markets to speed up independent case handling.

education.institution: Azerbaijan State Oil and Industry University

certifications: ACCA F3 Financial Accounting (In Progress — Expected Jun 2026)
